scripts.synth: cd ../.. && npm --prefix infra/cdk exec -- cdk synth
scripts.diff: cd ../.. && npm --prefix infra/cdk exec -- cdk diff
scripts.deploy: cd ../.. && npm --prefix infra/cdk exec -- cdk deploy --all --method direct --concurrency 3 --require-approval never --progress events
scripts.destroy: cd ../.. && npm --prefix infra/cdk exec -- cdk destroy --all --force --progress events
